CA-01.fix: Added zeroize crate; wrapped key bytes in Zeroizing<[u8; 32]> in read_key(), ensure_key(), and make_cipher()

CA-02.fix: Added validate_arguments() that parses file path and command arguments from JSON, validates paths against workspace scope with lexical normalization, and blocks dangerous shell patterns

CA-03.fix: Replaced manual URL construction with teloxide's built-in bot.download_file() method

CA-04.fix: Removed username matching in both check_allowed() and handle_telegram_message(); only numeric user IDs are matched

CA-05.fix: Replaced derive(Debug) with custom Debug impl that redacts api_key to first/last 4 chars; added skip_serializing_if for api_key

CA-06.fix: Added validate_path_in_workspace() and lexical_normalize() for runtime argument validation of file paths against workspace scope

DF-02.fix: Added temm1e-vault dependency to temm1e-agent; wired detect_credentials() call in process_message before appending to session history

DF-15.fix: convert_message_to_openai now returns all ToolResult parts as a JSON array; build_request_body flattens arrays into the messages list

CA-12_DF-12.fix: Added MAX_SESSIONS=1000 with LRU eviction and MAX_HISTORY_PER_SESSION=200 with truncation on update

DF-16.fix: Empty allowlist now denies all users in both check_allowed() and handle_telegram_message()
